description: Create a precision-timed human factors experiment scenario in Bridge Command named 'Exp) Vigilance Study 4H' to simulate a 4-hour monotony run in the English Channel at night. Configure the scenario directory at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/Exp) Vigilance Study 4H/ with environment.ini (Setting: English Channel East, StartTime: 0.0, Weather: 1.0, VisibilityRange: 12.0), ownship.ini (Name: 'MV Subject', Start: 49.00, -2.50, Heading: 000, Speed: 12.0 knots), and othership.ini. The othership.ini must define one target vessel named 'MV Stimulus' traveling at 18.0 knots on a reciprocal course (Heading 180) at longitude -2.50, with a starting latitude calculated to ensure a head-on intercept exactly 4.0 hours after the start. Generate a participant briefing file at /home/ga/Documents/experiment_briefing.txt. Use the conversion of 1 degree of latitude to 60 nautical miles for calculations.
